name: Space Voyager
short_description: Space voyager is a solo action/puzzle game with simple and effective gameplay. Swipe your way through space, but keep an eye of the fuel gauge !
detailed_description:
Lofi space trips to chill to.

Space voyager is a solo action/puzzle game with simple and effective gameplay. Swipe your way through space, but keep an eye of the fuel gauge !

With 50 levels to complete and a wide variety of obstacles, Space Voyager is a unique and challenging game with hours of gameplay.

Content


  • Simple gameplay to travel into space.
  • Easy to learn, difficult to master.
  • 50 levels with many different obstacles to cross.
  • Extra challenge modes for each level : bronze, silver, gold, time and star medals.
  • Original music and handcrafted audio.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Czech, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
